description: Realistic RAG queries across three tenant personas. Replayed twice by the observatory to demonstrate hit-rate climb + paraphrase coalescing.

tenants.persona: customer-support agent for an e-commerce store
developer evaluating Kyro for a RAG deployment
research analyst asking factual reference questions

queries.question: What is your refund policy?
How do I return a damaged item?
How fast does shipping arrive?
When will my order be delivered?
What is the return window for refunds?
Do you offer free shipping over $50?
What payment methods do you accept?
How do I install Kyro?
What language is Kyro written in?
Is Kyro open source?
What is your SLA?
Does Kyro support Redis as a cache backend?
How does the singleflight stampede protection work?
What does Kyro actually do?
What is the capital of France?
What is the capital of Germany?
What is the capital of the UK?
What is the meaning of life?
Tell me about the capital of France
Which city is the capital of Germany?
